name: AWS Keys With Permissive Access Policy
query: {kmsKeys( where: { OR: [ { AND: {policyDocument_MATCHES: ".*arn:aws:iam::[0-9*]+:root.*", managementType: { eq: "CustomerManaged" }} } { keyPolicy: { statements_SOME: { effect: { eq: "Allow" } conditions: { eq: [] } principals_INCLUDES: "AWS|*" } } } ] } ) {...AssetFragment}}
